name: ComparisonTable
description: A side-by-side comparison table for products, plans, or options. Features include highlighted recommended option, feature checkmarks, and category grouping.

visual.description: Horizontal table with sticky first column for feature names. Each column represents an option with header, price, and feature rows with check/cross indicators. Recommended column has a highlight border.
visual.layout: horizontal comparison columns with feature rows

props.name: options
props.description: Array of option objects with name, price, description, recommended flag, features record

props.name: features
props.description: Array of feature objects with key, label, category
